context.task_description: One-button Claude instance launcher with terminal control
context.user_report: everything is a white screen when opening in browser

primary_causes.description: Absolute import paths using '@/' not properly resolved
symptoms: No visible console errors to user

primary_causes.description: Components referenced in imports don't exist or have wrong exports
Error boundaries catch errors but don't display meaningful feedback

user_visible: Browser appears to load page successfully
network_tab: JavaScript bundles load but fail to execute

npm run dev shows app loading

measures: Use TypeScript strict mode for import checking
Add ESLint rules for import resolution

Use barrel exports for cleaner imports

Set up import resolution validation in CI

testing_strategy: E2E tests for full page loads
Visual regression tests for UI rendering

recommended_tests.description: Test that all components can be imported without errors

Test that routing works and doesn't cause white screen
